sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A minthang na nial ngei ke’n,
Hi kei leh na maizum ding;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Amah’n lo lai hong sam zo,
tung ding tu’n um in, Mainawt un!
Khotak i ding tawntung ding, Mainawt un!

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Vawh in, na atkik ding hi, Mainawt un!
Minthan ni dong hong kha ding Mainawt un!

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Zahtakna tawh nasem un, Mainawt un!
Lam tawntung hong vak ding hi;
Minthan ni dong hong kha ding, Mainawt

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Na vaite a mah ko in, Mainawt
Amah lenkip tawntung in, Mainawt un!
